{{Quote|Naturally we were hoping to win, especially in front of the home-planet crowd.|Coruscanti Captain Jipoly Numifolis, about their game against Team Fondor|<ref name="Game" />}}
'''Team Fondor''' was a [[Limmie/Legends|limmie]] sport team that played for<ref name="Game" /> the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]].<ref name="Game" /> In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|47|sports/13314_1.html|Coruscant Eliminated in Galactic Cup Opening Round}} is set on the date 13:3:14, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] according to the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> Team Fondor competed in the [[Galactic Cup of Limmie]], where they were matched against the inexperienced [[Team Coruscant|team]] of the planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in the opening round. When Fondor ultimately won three to one at the [[Coruscanti/Legends|Coruscanti]] home [[stadium]], the [[BlasTech Gikosphere]], the Coruscant team's captain [[Jipoly Numifolis]] expressed their dissatisfaction with the tournament's result in "Coruscant Eliminated in Galactic Cup Opening Round," a news story published in [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]].<ref name="Game" />

==Behind the scenes==
Team Fondor was mentioned in "Coruscant Eliminated in Galactic Cup Opening Round," an article<ref name="Game" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]].<ref name="credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #47]] on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="Game" /> on [[March 14]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN47 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archiveurl=http://web.archive.org/web/20220914072556/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-4#post-6042498}}</ref> The article includes an illustration drawn by [[Joe Corroney]]<ref name="credits" /> depicting Fondor's game against Coruscant. Although one of the two teams is visible, it is not clear which.<ref name="Game" />
